title: Electric PvP
description: Electric 16x is a PvP texture pack made by oddish to increase performance and skills without sacrificing Minecraft's signature look.
body:
### **Description**
Electric 16x is a competitive PvP texture pack created by oddish, engineered to boost performance and refine combat visibility without abandoning Minecraft’s iconic visual style. Clean, crisp, and efficient, it’s built for players who want every advantage while keeping the game unmistakably Minecraft.

### **Compatibility**
Fully tested and optimized for Minecraft 1.21–1.21.11. The pack is expected to function correctly on 1.20 and newer versions, though minor inconsistencies may occur outside the tested range.

### **Credits**
Some textures are adapted from Vanilla Tweaks, used with appreciation and respect for the original creators.

### **License & Usage**
This project is released under the MIT License.
Editing or redistributing this pack requires explicit permission from the owner. Unauthorized copies, reuploads, or modified versions will be taken down immediately.
